text: Eating a balanced diet, with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling, keeps your heart and muscles strong. But don’t forget sleep – at least seven or eight hours each night helps your brain recharge. Mental health is just as important; take time to relax, meditate, or talk with friends. Finally, a good work-life balance means setting limits on work hours and making time for hobbies and family. Healthy living is about caring for your whole self, every day.
